name: Shapely
description: Shapely — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Geospatial.

seo.title: Shapely Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Shapely analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Shapely is a Maps / Geolocation / Routing tool.
pros: Rich mapping and geocoding APIs with global coverage
cons: API call costs grow quickly with high map usage
review.best_for: Apps with location search, routing, or delivery features
review.not_for: Apps with no geographic or location requirements
